{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321142032C8FC7431C99626CBE774"}"},"total":105},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7605309486939308824","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者还给主角加了个新BOSS，也算是符合原著角色，一定要有一个命运中的宿敌这个特点。 
不后宫，目前无女主，对原著角色也有给予尊重，虽然知道剧情，但基本没有穿越者掌握剧本的高傲。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770761653,"group_id":"7586663150934576190","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1603503556133260"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7586663150934576190","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"109"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":10735,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":14310,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":84},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7605328880882680600","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很不错的一本。
主角是警察，没有别的柯南同人文里面一堆复杂红黑身份，也没有人气值弹幕论坛体之类的东西。就主角每天在警察局打工的剧情，没有和酒厂发生关系。
主角是自身就有高智商+高武力值（多高不知道，但主角没吃过亏）+知道原著剧情。所以到现场直接打断柯南技能读条，剥去冗长的推理桥段，以警察视角看柯学。
不是一味的抄原作，作者有加自己原创的推理剧情，所以也没有那种发生蝴蝶扇动翅膀改变剧情后，主角没有原剧情加持开始手忙脚乱的桥段。
而且主角性格我挺喜欢的，不骄不躁，自身有底气，性格随性，但大局是一直掌握在手中的，有主见，有魅力。可见这本书作者文笔不错。","text_exts":[{"e":45,"s":42,"text":"论坛体","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%AE%BA%E5%9D%9B%E4%BD%93&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177407403226CBE774%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227605328880882680600%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227586663150934576190%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%AE%BA%E5%9D%9B%E4%BD%93%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":87,"s":84,"text":"高智商","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%AB%98%E6%99%BA%E5%95%86&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177407403226CBE774%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227605328880882680600%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227586663150934576190%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%AB%98%E6%99%BA%E5%95%86%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770761495,"group_id":"7586663150934576190","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"怎么，对我有兴趣？","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N58N9hh9F+1ZA4h4u2QbIwoI7x+E9nslUcth6C3o9Hgs","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/17081370248a408cad27230b1fd885a6~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776615374&x-signature=YDFck%2FvVe17dDJNFULxWrztx9cM%3D","user_id":"1603503556133260","user_name":"双死就是HE"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1603503556133260","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1728986311,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7586663150934576190","book_info":{"abstract":"（评分刚出，后面会涨，不是双穿，反派无系统）
青山秀信意外穿越，成为了一名刑警。
是犯罪都市米花町，太好了，我们完蛋辣！
在这里你能见识到钓鱼线的一百种用法、千奇百怪的杀人动机、还有各种各样的不在场证明……
行了行了，已经品鉴够多了，赶紧端下去吧！
青山秀信不想当侦探推理，只想早点破案下班。
“他是凶手，把他带走，搜他房间！”
面对凶手的狡辩，青山秀信懒得废话，并朝其丢了个柯南。
凶手跪倒，忏悔小曲一放，齐活了。
主持人：“青山警官，请问您是如何识破犯人的？可以分享一下你的破案经验吗？”
“简单的三选一，排除两个错误答案就能猜对了！”
主持人：“现在网上都在质疑，这会不会是你自导自演……？”
青山秀信：“这是赤裸裸的污蔑，我只是想早点下班，我有什么错！不说了，我下班了。”
看了眼手表，青山秀信站起身离开了演播室，留下了一众懵逼的电视台人员。
